title: Escape from Death Star

'''''Escape from Death Star''''' was a board game that was released by [[Kenner Products|Kenner]] in [[1977]]. It was based on the [[Rescue of Princess Leia/Legends|events]] of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']]. It was distributed by [[Parker Brothers]] in [[Wikipedia:Canada|Canada]]<ref name="ParkerCanada">{{CargoBay|url=item-detail/12393|text=Escape From Death Star (Canada)}}</ref> and [[Wikipedia:Germany|Germany]], Editrice Giochi in Italy,<ref name="Versions" /> [[Toltoys]] in [[Wikipedia:Australia|Australia]],<ref name="Toltoys">{{CargoBay|url=item-detail/12392|text=Escape From Death Star (Australia)}}</ref> [[w:c:swmerchandise:Clipper|Clipper]] in the [[Wikipedia:Netherlands|Netherlands]],<ref name="Clipper">{{WebCite|url=http://theswca.com/index.php?action=disp_item&item_id=7793|text=Ontsnap Aan De Ster des Doods (Escape from DS Game)|work=[http://theswca.com ''The Star Wars Collectors Archive'']|archiveurl=https://archive.fo/VwLcf}}</ref> [[Wikipedia:Estrela (company)|Estrela]] in [[Wikipedia:Brazil|Brazil]],<ref name="Estrela">{{WebCite|url=http://theswca.com/index.php?action=disp_item&item_id=7771|text=Fugada Estrela da Morte (Escape from the Death Star)|work=[http://theswca.com ''The Star Wars Collectors Archive'']|archiveurl=https://archive.fo/y2PKd}}</ref> Borras Plana S.A. in [[Wikipedia:Spain|Spain]],<ref name="Versions" /> and [[Tomy|Takara]] in [[Wikipedia:Japan|Japan]].<ref name="Cargo Bay Takara" />

==Gameplay==
The players' mission was to move character tokens ([[Han Solo/Legends|Han]]/[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]]/[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]]) to the Control Room and Tractor Beam to get the [[Death Star plans/Legends|Death Star Blueprints]]. After this, players made their way to the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] and jump into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

Once there, the goal was to reach the [[Yavin 4/Legends|rebel base]] with the Death Star blueprints. After battling and defeating several [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] the game is won by the player first to arrive at the base with the plans.

==Legacy==
In [[2019]], [[Hasbro]] released a reproduction of the original game — now including a new vintage style [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin|Tarkin]] action figure — as part of the ''[[Star Wars:  Retro Collection]]'' toy line.<ref name="Retro" />
